nodes.name: Retell Webhook
nodes.notes:
Receives call_started / call_ended / call_analyzed events from Retell AI.
Configure this webhook URL in the Retell dashboard under your agent's webhook settings.

nodes.name: Only call_analyzed
nodes.notes: We only need to act on call_analyzed — it fires last and contains the full transcript and analysis.

nodes.name: Write to Firestore
nodes.notes:
Uses Firestore REST API with OAuth2 (Google Cloud credentials).
Alternatively, POST directly to your Next.js /api/webhooks/retell endpoint to use the Admin SDK.

meta.description:
Logs every completed Ava call to Firestore (clinics/{clinicId}/voiceInteractions/{callId}).

Required env vars:
  FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID — your Firestore project (clinical-tracker-spires)
  RETELL_CLINIC_ID    — the Firestore clinic document ID (e.g. spires)

Also requires a Google Cloud OAuth2 credential in n8n with Firestore read/write scope,
or configure to POST to /api/webhooks/retell on your Next.js app instead (recommended).
